## [The protocols.md namespace](../conventions/protocols-md/)

A single maintainer's pre-registered namespace of ~74 aspirational .md "protocols" (proof.md, signature.md, reputation.md, …) staked as Schelling points for a future agent web. Published concept, no demonstrated adoption - see the page for the audited, honest caveats.
